{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "geoo115", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/127685842?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/geoo115", "id": 127685842, "login": "geoo115", "node_id": "U_kgDOB5xU0g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-20706", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "## Summary

PR #37698 added checkDownloadTokenScope to /raw/*, /media/*, and attachment download web endpoints. The /archive/* endpoint (repo.Download in routers/web/repo/repo.go:372) was not included in the fix. This endpoint accepts OAuth2 tokens via webAuth.AllowOAuth2 (registered at routers/web/web.go:1649-1652) but does not call checkDownloadTokenScope or CheckRepoScopedToken.

A personal access token with any non-repository scope (e.g., read:issue or read:misc) can download full repository archives (zip/tar.gz) of private repositories the token owner has access to.

## Impact

Scope escalation: tokens scoped to non-repository categories can access full repository content through the archive download endpoint. Higher impact than endpoints fixed in #37698 because /archive/* serves the entire repository.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Create a personal access token with ONLY read:misc scope
2. Access: GET /{owner}/{private-repo}/archive/main.tar.gz
3. Archive is served (200 OK) instead of being rejected (403 Forbidden)

Compare with fixed endpoints:
- GET /{owner}/{private-repo}/raw/branch/main/README.md correctly returns 403

## Root Cause

Download function in routers/web/repo/repo.go:372 does not call checkDownloadTokenScope. The outer group middleware reqUnitCodeReader checks repository permission but not token scope.

The API equivalent (/api/v1/repos/{owner}/{repo}/archive/*) IS properly scoped via tokenRequiresScopes(AccessTokenScopeCategoryRepository). The git HTTP endpoints are scoped via CheckRepoScopedToken in httpBase.

## Suggested Fix

Add checkDownloadTokenScope(ctx) to Download and InitiateDownload in routers/web/repo/repo.go. The function already exists in routers/web/repo/download.go (same package).

## Discovery Method

Variant analysis of PR #37698 — reviewed all web routes with webAuth.AllowOAuth2 middleware.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-20706"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T22:23:49Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/81045?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/lunny", "id": 81045, "login": "lunny", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgxMDQ1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/lunny", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Token scope bypass on web archive download endpoint (variant of PR #37698)", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T22:23:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "patched_versions": "1.26.2", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Token scope bypass on web archive download endpoint (variant of PR #37698)
